title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for an efficient tool API and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose tool granularity that maps to meaningful user intent without unsafe generic execution.
Write discriminative descriptions, constrained schemas, examples, and side-effect metadata.
Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""
